clues: The computer has become sluggish and some files fail to open with read errors.
Programs occasionally freeze while loading certain files.
Backing up files to an external drive fails partway through with an 'I/O device error'.
Running CHKDSK reports 'bad sectors' being found and marked.
The disk's S.M.A.R.T. status reports 'Reallocated Sector Count' has exceeded the warning threshold.
